EPISODE_NARRATIVE: A tropical wave moved into the area, promoting the development of frequent and persistent showers and thunderstorms. Rainfall accumulations in St. Croix were widespread, with significant urban flooding and impassable roads.
EVENT_NARRATIVE: Debris flow due to heavy rains was reported at the Aloy Wenty Nielsen Bypass (VI-66). This debris flow occured between the Bypass Overlook and the Intersection with Hospital St and East End Rd. The debris was reported to have been removed around 10 AM.

EVENT_NARRATIVE: Emergency managers reported flooding affecting the Ruby M. Ross Housing Complex between the Vester Gade and Valmy Thomas Lane.
